reason: Normalize inconsistent placeholder vessel names in the Name column ahead of the data release. Same yard was spelled multiple ways across sibling rows: 'Hyundai Samho HI' vs 'HD Hyundai Samho Yeongam'; 'Hudong-Zhonghua Shanghai' vs 'Hudong-Zhonghua'; 'HD Hyundai HI (HHI) Ulsan' vs 'HD Hyundai HI Ulsan' (unified by dropping the parenthetical (HHI) token cluster-wide). Owner-portion fixes: 'Hanwha Ocean (Knutsen)' -> '(Knutsen OAS 2)' (canonical owner form + missing ordinal, sister of (Knutsen OAS 1)); 'Samsung HI Geoje (shipowner unknown)' -> '(owner unknown)'. All edits are cosmetic/derived-name changes; existing Name [ref]s (which document the underlying order, not the literal string) are preserved via preserve_ref.
